samples.text: All fish can swim. A salmon is a fish. Can the salmon swim?
Every fish is capable of swimming. A salmon belongs to the fish category. Is the salmon able to swim?
Fish are animals that can swim. A salmon is classified as a fish. Can a salmon swim?
All aquatic vertebrates classified as fish can swim. A salmon is one such fish. Can the salmon swim?
Salmons are fish. Fish can swim. Therefore, can salmons swim?
All fish can swim. Bananas are usually yellow. A salmon is a fish. Can the salmon swim?
